steps.t: The grodbog-lair is in the Palace of Náin, north of Lamâb-dûm. Thórhall asked you to take the scent-glands to the grodbog-hive and crush them. The res…
Thórhall is at the small dwarf-camp in Lamab-dûm, south of the Palace of Náin. You should report back to Thórhall with news of your success.
